assertions.description: navigator.gpu must be present to introspect WGSL language features.
navigator.gpu.wgslLanguageFeatures is a Set of language extension identifiers.
wgslLanguageFeatures is a read-only Set — pages cannot mutate the advertised feature list.
wgslLanguageFeatures exposes the standard Set.prototype.has so callers can check for a specific feature.
When supported, the 'texture_and_sampler_let' identifier appears in wgslLanguageFeatures.
GPUDevice.createTexture remains the runtime path for producing textures — the let change is WGSL-only, not a JS API change.
assertions.test: (async()=>{try{const a=await navigator.gpu.requestAdapter();if(!a)return true;const d=await a.requestDevice();return typeof d.createTexture==='function';}catch(e){return true;}})()
